ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notifications when pages were processed.
ast.target: 处理页面时显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not show additional commands in command palette. Reload the plugin in settings to take effect (turn off/on).
ast.target: 不在命令选项板中显示其他命令。在设置中重新加载插件以生效（关闭/打开）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process notes on create/copy/paste.
ast.target: 创建/复制/粘贴的过程说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval in seconds for processing update. It takes some time to reveal changed content of a note to plugins.
ast.target: 处理更新的间隔（秒）。向插件显示注释的更改内容需要一些时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If an error occurs during downloading (network etc.) try to re-download several times.
ast.target: 如果在下载过程中发生错误（网络等），请尝试重新下载几次。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process all new created/cloud-synced files with corresponding extensions.
ast.target: 处理所有新创建/云同步的具有相应扩展名的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will also move all attachments from obsidian default folder to plugin folder.
ast.target: 该插件还将把所有附件从Obsidian默认文件夹移动到插件文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will use MD5 when renaming all new attachments.
ast.target: 该插件在重命名所有新附件时将使用MD5。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compress all downloaded images. May reduce file size by several times, but can also affect performance.
ast.target: 压缩所有下载的图像。可能会将文件大小减小数倍，但也会影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compress all pasted images. May reduce file size by several times, but can also affect performance.
ast.target: 压缩所有粘贴的图像。可能会将文件大小减小数倍，但也会影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select image compression type. Keep in mind that webp format has image size limitations.
ast.target: 选择图像压缩类型。请记住，webp格式有图像大小限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Excluded folders. New files in these folders will not be processed automatically.
ast.target: 已排除文件夹。这些文件夹中的新文件不会自动处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Image quality selection (30 to 100).
ast.target: 图像质量选择（30到100）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not download files with size less than this value. Set 0 for no limit.
ast.target: 不要下载小于此值的文件。将0设置为无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will not download attachments with these extensions.
ast.target: 该插件不会下载带有这些扩展的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will not create an Obsidian attachments folder. This may cause the plugin to behave incorrectly.
ast.target: 该插件不会创建Obsidian附件文件夹。这可能会导致插件行为不正确。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add media links captions to converted tags.
ast.target: 将媒体链接标题添加到转换后的标签中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add [[original filename]] or [original filename](link to attachment) after replaced tag (only for file:// protocol or dropped/pasted files ).
ast.target: 在替换标签后添加 [[原始文件名]] 或 [原始文件名将]（链接到附件）（仅适用于file://协议 或拖放/粘贴的文件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include only files with extensions only matching this pattern. Example: md|canvas
ast.target: 仅包含扩展名仅与此模式匹配的文件。示例：md|canvas

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not move orphaned files into the garbage can.
ast.target: 不要将孤立文件移动到垃圾桶中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select whether to write full paths in tags or not.
ast.target: 选择是否在标记中写入完整路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Date format for ${date} variable. E.g.                  | MMMM Do YYYY, h:mm:ss a (March 20th 2024, 10:54:46 am)                  | dddd  (Wednesday)                 | MMM Do YY  (Mar 20th 24)
ast.target: ${Date}变量的日期格式。E.g.                  | MMMM Do YYYY, h:mm:ss a (March 20th 2024, 10:54:46 am)                  | dddd  (Wednesday)                 | MMM Do YY  (Mar 20th 24)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to keep all downloaded media files.
ast.target: 用于保存所有下载媒体文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug output to console.
ast.target: 启用调试输出到控制台。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show notifications
ast.target: 显示通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disable additional commands
ast.target: 禁用其他命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic processing
ast.target: 自动处理

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic processing interval
ast.target: 自动处理间隔

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of retries for every single attachment
ast.target: 每个附件的重试次数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Process all new markdown files
ast.target: 处理所有新的markdown文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Process all new attachments
ast.target: 处理所有新附件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use MD5 for new attachments (Pasted images and files)
ast.target: 将MD5用于新附件（粘贴的图像和文件）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Download unknown filetypes
ast.target: 下载未知文件类型

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Compress images (Web Images)
ast.target: 压缩图像（Web图像）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Compress images (Pasted Images)
ast.target: 压缩图像（粘贴图像）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Compression type
ast.target: 压缩类型

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Excluded folders
ast.target: 排除的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Image Quality
ast.target: 图像质量

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File size lower limit in Kb
ast.target: 文件大小下限（Kb）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Do not create Obsidian attachment folder (For compatibility with other plugins)
ast.target: 不要创建 Obsidian 附件文件夹（为了与其他插件兼容）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Preserve link captions
ast.target: 保留链接标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add original filename or 'Open file' tag
ast.target: 添加原始文件名或“打开文件”标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include pattern
ast.target: 包括图案

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How to write paths in tags
ast.target: 如何在标签中写入路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Date format
ast.target: 日期格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folder to save new attachments
ast.target: 用于保存新附件的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Move/delete/rename media folder
ast.target: 移动/删除/重命名媒体文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Media folder
ast.target: 媒体文件夹

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the full path in new lines, e.g. RootFolder/Subfolder.
ast.target: Enter the full path in new lines, e.g. RootFolder/Subfolder.

ast.target: Localize attachments for the current note (plugin folder)

ast.target: Localize attachments for the current note (Obsidian folder)

ast.target: Localize attachments for all your notes (plugin folder)
